name: No-Bake Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the sugar, peanut butter, and vegetable oil. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until the sugar melts.
3. Remove from heat. Add the peanut butter morsels to the saucepan, stirring until they melt.
4. Add this mixture to the oat mixture, stirring until the dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto wax paper.
6. Chill about 30 minutes or until set.
